workflow_goal: Fetch live AWOS runtime endpoints on a recurring schedule, verify the bucket state, emit a standardized PASS/WARN/FAIL record, and upload artifacts for audit.
validation_plan: Wait for or trigger the first workflow run.
Confirm the emitted bucket record matches the standardized PASS/WARN/FAIL JSON contract.
rollback_plan: Disable the workflow in GitHub Actions.
Revert the workflow file if the runner behavior is incorrect.
